user.title: SMARTWIZ+ art Setup
user.description: Manual setup fallback. Device ID is required. Enter host only when using a fixed IP address. If omitted, smartwiz-art-[device_id].local will be used.

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered SMARTWIZ+ art
discovery_confirm.description: SMARTWIZ+ art device {device_id} was discovered at {host}. Confirm to register it with Home Assistant.

error.cannot_resolve: Could not resolve host information from discovery.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Check the host setting and network connection, then try again.
error.registration_timeout: The device was found but did not respond. It may be asleep. Press the button on the device to wake it up, then try again within 1 minute.
error.key_exchange_failed: The device responded, but key registration failed. If it is already registered in the official app or another app, remove it there first, then try again.

abort.not_smartwiz_art: The discovered device is not a SMARTWIZ+ art panel.

render_today.name: Render today panel
render_today.description: Generate a SMARTWIZ+ art image from explicitly provided values.

ha_device_id.name: Home Assistant device(s)
ha_device_id.description: Target SMARTWIZ+ art device(s). Multiple selection supported.

update.name: Update panel
update.description: Build panel data from Home Assistant entities.

ha_device_id.name: SMARTWIZ+ art device(s)
ha_device_id.description: Target SMARTWIZ+ art device(s). Multiple selection supported.

weather_attribute.name: Weather attribute
weather_attribute.description: Uses the state if omitted. Example: forecast.0.condition

high_temp_attribute.name: High temperature attribute
high_temp_attribute.description: Uses the state if omitted. Example: forecast.0.temperature

low_temp_attribute.name: Low temperature attribute
low_temp_attribute.description: Uses the state if omitted. Example: forecast.0.templow

rain_attribute.name: Rain attribute
rain_attribute.description: Uses the state if omitted. Example: forecast.0.precipitation_probability

calendar_entity.name: Calendar entity
calendar_entity.description: Calendar entity used as schedule source.

calendar_attribute.name: Calendar attribute
calendar_attribute.description: Uses the state if omitted. Example: message

schedule_attribute.name: Schedule attribute
schedule_attribute.description: Uses the state if omitted. Supports string, list, and newline-separated text.

front_lock_entity.name: Front lock entity
front_lock_entity.description: Entity used for front door lock state.

home_status_attribute.name: Home status attribute
home_status_attribute.description: Uses the state if omitted. Supports list and newline-separated text.

message_attribute.name: Message attribute
message_attribute.description: Uses the state if omitted. Example: message / friendly_name

image_path_attribute.name: Image path attribute
image_path_attribute.description: Uses the state if omitted. Example: /media/my_picture.png

photo_preset.name: Photo preset
photo_preset.description: Preset for adjusting photo tone and contrast (auto / natural / vivid / soft)

source_map.name: Source map
source_map.description:
Map template variables to entity IDs using name: entity_id format.

register_device.name: Register device
register_device.description: Register the device for SMARTWIZ+ art local API access. This creates or reuses the local RSA key pair and stores the device public key returned by the device.

host.name: Host IP
host.description: Overrides the configured host IP address when set.

unregister_device.name: Unregister device
unregister_device.description: Unregister the device from SMARTWIZ+ art local API access. This requires the same private key that was used during registration.

host.name: Host IP
host.description: Overrides the configured host IP address when set.

purge_local_keys.name: Purge local keys
purge_local_keys.description: Also delete local app_private.der and app_public.der after a successful unregister.
